## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `swift test`
- [ ] Added or updated tests, if parser/import/persistence behavior changed
- [ ] Manually checked the menu bar UI, if UI changed

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No shell execution or command-running behavior added
- [ ] No broad filesystem permissions added
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private user data committed
- [ ] Source/import changes preserve visible official vs community labeling
